title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
